Let ball = x. Bat = x + $1.00. Together: x + (x+1.00) = 1.20. 2x = 0.20. x = $0.10 = 10 cents.
Each machine makes 1 widget in 5 minutes. 100 machines make 100 widgets in 5 minutes (parallel production).

Day 30 = full. Day 29 = half. Day 28 = quarter. Each day backward halves the coverage.
At hour 12 = full. At hour 11 = 1/3 of full (since one tripling later fills it). Working backward: 12-1 = 11.

After the transfer, both jars have 10L. Whatever wine is missing from Jar A has been replaced by an equal amount of water, and vice versa. So wine in B = water in A.

accepted_forms: the missing dollar is a fallacy
source_anchor: The $27 paid by the friends INCLUDES the $2 tip. The correct accounting: $25 (meal) + $2 (tip) = $27 paid, and $3 returned. $27 + $3 = $30. The question misleadingly adds the $2 to $27 instead of subtracting it.
Burj Khalifa height: 828m (official). Golden Gate main span: 1,280m (goldengate.org). 828 × 1 = 828 < 1,280. 828 × 2 = 1,656 > 1,280. So 2 Burj Khalifas exceed the span.
Suriname area: ~163,821 km² (World Population Review). Belgium area: ~30,689 km² (Belgium.be official). 163,821 / 30,689 ≈ 5.34 ≈ 5.3.
Everest: 8,849m (2020 survey). Challenger Deep: 10,984m. Difference: 10,984 - 8,849 = 2,135m of water above the peak.
Antoine equation (log10(P/mmHg) = 8.10765 - 1750.286/(235+T)). At 760 mmHg: T=100°C. At 380 mmHg: T≈81.7°C. Decrease ≈ 18°C. NOT 50°C — the relationship is logarithmic, not linear.
